scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-contracts && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-product-adapters && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-validator && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-compiler && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-scaffold-templates && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-review-doc && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-api-client && npm run build --workspace @pgw/apps-generator-api && npm run build --workspace @pgw/apps-wizard-ui && npm run build --workspace @pgw/apps-preview-sandbox && npm run build --workspace @pgw/tools-generator-cli && npm run build --workspace @pgw/tests-e2e && npm run build --workspace @pgw/tests-preview-e2e
scripts.test: npm test --workspace @pgw/packages-contracts && npm test --workspace @pgw/packages-product-adapters && npm test --workspace @pgw/packages-validator && npm test --workspace @pgw/packages-compiler && npm test --workspace @pgw/packages-scaffold-templates && npm test --workspace @pgw/packages-review-doc && npm test --workspace @pgw/packages-api-client && npm test --workspace @pgw/apps-generator-api && npm test --workspace @pgw/apps-wizard-ui && npm test --workspace @pgw/apps-preview-sandbox && npm test --workspace @pgw/tools-generator-cli && npm test --workspace @pgw/tests-e2e && npm test --workspace @pgw/tests-preview-e2e
scripts.perf:baseline: npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-contracts && npm run build --workspace @pgw/apps-generator-api && node tools/perf-baseline.mjs
scripts.perf:preview: npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-contracts && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-product-adapters && npm run build --workspace @pgw/apps-generator-api && node tools/perf-preview.mjs
scripts.perf:longrun: npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-contracts && npm run build --workspace @pgw/apps-generator-api && node tools/perf-longrun.mjs
scripts.dr:check: npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-contracts && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-validator && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-compiler && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-scaffold-templates && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-review-doc && npm run build --workspace @pgw/tools-generator-cli && node tools/dr-check.mjs
scripts.synthetic:probe: npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-contracts && npm run build --workspace @pgw/apps-generator-api && node tools/synthetic-probe.mjs
scripts.preview:gate: npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-contracts && npm run build --workspace @pgw/packages-product-adapters && npm run build --workspace @pgw/apps-generator-api && node tools/preview-contract-gate.mjs fixtures/preview/pilot-built-product-intake.json
scripts.quota:review: npm run build --workspace @pgw/apps-generator-api && node tools/tenant-quota-review.mjs config/tenant-quotas.json
